name: PANACEA LIFE SCIENCES HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: PART I General Panacea Life Sciences Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB: PLSH) is a holding company organized as a plant-based natural health ingredient and product company, specializing in the development, manufacturing, research, and distribution of products within the $134B and rapidly growing natural health and wellness market segment for both humans and animals.
